message:
fix(brenner): update confirm_sessions API and improve codebase robustness

Brenner wizard changes:
- confirm_sessions now accepts Vec<SelectedSession> directly
- Caller builds sessions with full Session data and quality scores
- Fixed Session.id field access (was incorrectly using session_id)

TUI build changes:
- Updated handle_session_selection_key to build SelectedSession properly
- Passes quality_scorer through the call chain

Security improvements:
- Bundle manifest validates paths for traversal attacks
- Meta-skill lookup uses exact match only (no fuzzy FTS for safety)

Determinism fixes:
- Dependency resolver sorts closure and providers
- Meta-skill output sorted by skill ID

Error handling:
- sync/engine.rs handles archive snapshot errors gracefully
- Clippy format string fixes in acip.rs and command_safety.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
